user.title: UniFi WAN
user.description: Enter your UniFi OS connection details.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate UniFi WAN
reauth_confirm.description: The API key for {host} is no longer valid. Enter a new API key.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot reach the console. Check the Host/IP (just the address, no https:// or port) and that TCP port 443 is open from Home Assistant to the console.
error.invalid_auth: The API key was rejected. Use a local API key created on the console under Settings > Control Plane > Integrations (requires UniFi Network 9.0+). Keys from unifi.ui.com are not supported.
error.invalid_site: The console returned 404 Not Found. Check the Site name (usually 'default', not the display name) and that the console runs UniFi OS (UDM/UDR/UXG/Cloud Key with firmware 2.x or later).
error.ssl_error: SSL certificate verification failed. Turn off 'Verify SSL Certificate' unless your console has a valid trusted certificate.
error.timeout: The console did not respond within 30 seconds. Check the Host/IP and that no firewall is blocking TCP port 443.

abort.already_configured: This UniFi controller and site is already configured.

data.api_key: API Key (leave blank to keep current)

run_speedtest.name: Run Speedtest
run_speedtest.description: Trigger a manual speedtest on the active UniFi Gateway immediately.

wan.name: WAN interface
wan.description: Optional WAN number to test (e.g. 1 or 2). Omit to test the active WAN.
